evals.prompt: /discuss Should we migrate our PostgreSQL database to DynamoDB? We have 50GB of relational data with some JSON columns. --mode converge --duration 5m
evals.expected_output: Recruits database experts. Discussion runs with facilitator-directed turns. Convergence via NGT voting. Output includes decision, rationale, dissent, confidence.

evals.prompt: /discuss What are the implications of AI agents having persistent memory? --duration 10m
evals.expected_output: Exploration mode. Recruits AI ethics, cognitive science experts. Synthesis produces ideas map, key insights, open questions.

evals.prompt: /discuss How should we structure auth for our microservices? --mode converge --size 0 --duration 5m
evals.expected_output: Core team only (--size 0). Focused discussion with 3 agents. Convergence with NGT voting.

evals.prompt: /discuss What makes a great engineering culture? --duration 8m --models all-sonnet
evals.expected_output: Exploration mode. All-sonnet models. Broad topic, diverse experts. Rich exploration with multiple threads.

evals.prompt: /discuss Should we open-source our internal developer tools? The tools are mature, widely used internally, but maintaining OSS would take ~20% of one engineer's time. --mode converge
evals.expected_output: Recruits OSS strategy and developer relations experts. Considers business value, community building, talent attraction, maintenance cost.

evals.prompt: Let's brainstorm how to reduce our cloud bill by 40% without affecting performance.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger discuss skill (brainstorm with team). Recruits cloud cost optimization expert. Explore mode. Generates concrete strategies.

evals.prompt: Fix the bug in the login handler where sessions expire too early.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger discuss. This is a specific coding task, not a discussion topic.
